content:
MODULE: cosmos.dex.api
FILE: cosmos/dex/api.py (394 lines)
CATEGORY: dex

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos DEX API - Real-time token data aggregation
Pulls from DexScreener, Birdeye, Jupiter, and more

CLASSES:
- TokenPair: Represents a trading pair
- TrendingToken: Trending token with rank
- DexAPI: Aggregated DEX data API
Combines DexScreener, Birdeye, Jupiter for comprehensive
  Methods: async def close(self)
  Methods: async def search_tokens(self, query: str) -> List[TokenPair]
  Methods: async def get_token_by_address(self, address: str) -> Optional[TokenPair]
  Methods: async def get_pair_by_address(self, pair_address: str, chain: str='solana') -> Optional[TokenPair]
  Methods: async def get_trending_tokens(self, chain: str='solana') -> List[TrendingToken]
  Methods: async def get_new_pairs(self, chain: str='solana', limit: int=20) -> List[TokenPair]
  Methods: async def get_top_gainers(self, chain: str='solana', timeframe: str='h24') -> List[TokenPair]
  Methods: async def get_top_losers(self, chain: str='solana', timeframe: str='h24') -> List[TokenPair]
